page_metadata.biotools__summary: ErrorX is a software for automated error correction of B- and T-cell receptor NGS datasets. ErrorX uses deep learning to automatically identify bases that have a high probability of being erroneous.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ErrorX is a software for automated error correction of B- and T-cell receptor NGS datasets. ErrorX uses deep learning to automatically identify bases that have a high probability of being erroneous.
